text:
Trump put his name on everything your government does:

- His face on the dollar coin
- His face on National Parks passes
- Renamed the Kennedy Center after himself
- Named Navy battleships after himself
- Renamed the US Institute of Peace after himself
- "TrumpRx" government drug program
- "Trump Accounts" government savings accounts
- Giant banners of his face on federal buildings

This is what narcissism looks like when it has unchecked power.
